offer: For freelancers using Upwork processing 5–15 timesheets/month, manual tracking causes payment delays. We convert raw hours into formatted reports instead of manual tracking and formatting of hours.
problem: Converting raw employee hours into formatted timesheet reports for payroll processing.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where freelancers seek help
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar workflows
DM outreach to freelancers with demo video
Community forums where freelancers share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of raw hours and formatting options
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
